b_issues: Includes a Facebook post result that is almost entirely garbled SVG/icon code with only a one-line snippet of useful text, adding noise; doesn't mention Bay Area or Buffalo testing; the '34 robotaxis' figure from Planetizen is unsourced/unclear whether it refers to Cybercabs specifically or the broader Model Y robotaxi fleet, and reliability of briefs.co/planetizen as sources is uncertain.
reasoning: Neither content set contains information about Buffalo testing or a clear Bay Area Cybercab test-fleet count matching the anchor's 'seven units across Austin and Bay Area' fact from ilovetesla.com. Given the tradeoffs—A's cleaner reliable info vs. B's partial fleet-size data amid noisy content—the two are roughly equivalent in overall ability to answer the full question.
